sources.notes: Per-tool official documentation pages (fetched 2026-07-13; imagemagick.org moved these from /script/<tool>.php to /<tool>/). One seed page per sub-command (seed/animate.md ... seed/stream.md) synthesized from each tool's page combined with general ImageMagick knowledge. Content synthesized, not copied verbatim.

seed/gemini-watermark.md: watermark placement rule (96x96px @ 192px bottom-right margin, 0.5x for small renders) measured 2026-07-14 across 8 Gemini/Imagen aspect-ratio samples with magick, plus the LaMa/IOPaint inpainting workflow validated locally. Original observations, not derived from any scraped source.
